source_pr.title: ttl: auto delete old rows in `mysql.tidb_ttl_job_history`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #40807

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No explicit flaky failure signature is described in the PR or reflected in the patch; the changes add TTL job history tracking (new `mysql.tidb_ttl_job_history` table) and update TTL worker logic and tests.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (feature/tests change for TTL job history).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR introduces TTL job history recording and associated schema/bootstrap changes plus test updates. The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Add TTL job history table/recording and update TTL worker/tests; no targeted flaky stabilization evidence in patch.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select job_id, scan_id from mysql.tidb_ttl_task order by job_id, scan_id asc").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "1 2")) (ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go)

files: executor/infoschema_cluster_table_test.go, session/bootstrap.go, ttl/cache/ttlstatus.go, ttl/ttlworker/config.go, ttl/ttlworker/job.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_test.go

analysis:
PR title: ttl: auto delete old rows in `mysql.tidb_ttl_job_history`
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/40808
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: tk.MustQuery("select job_id, scan_id from mysql.tidb_ttl_task order by job_id, scan_id asc").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "1 2")) (ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go)
Changed files (3): ttl/ttlworker/config.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
